data.text: P03 A FELISIAN WORLD WITH A COMBINATION OF GREYISH AND PURPLISH
REFLECTIVITY THAT IS DISTURBING, PARTICULARLY SINCE ONE CAN NOTE A
LARGE NUMBER OF LESSER BODIES OF WATER FROM ORBIT. LANDING AT
354.057 WAS ON A GRASSY SLOPE WITH TREES AND BUSHES, HEADING
DOWN HILL TO FLAT GROUND COVERED WITH SMALL BODIES OF WATER. 329.04
WAS ALSO GRASSY WITH TREES AND BUSHES, AND THERE WAS A TALL PEAK AT
-03.59, AS WELL AS A DEEP CRATER LIKE PIT AT 70.12, PLUS A MOUND
ISLAND OFF SHORE TO THE NORTH. 347.102 WAS COLD AND BARREN, HOWEVER
THOUGH BIRD LIFE DID LAND.PRO 0.180.720; PRV 0.045.915.668
